package fixture

import "context"

// Const-backed Operation(): WriterName != struct name (monster stat pattern).
const SomeWriter = "SomePacket"

type SomeStruct struct {
	val byte
}

func (m SomeStruct) Operation() string { return SomeWriter }

func (m SomeStruct) Encode(_ interface{}, _ context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteByte(m.val)
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}

// Another struct in the same file sharing a different const-backed writer name.
const OtherWriter = "OtherPacket"

type OtherStruct struct {
	x int32
}

func (m OtherStruct) Operation() string { return OtherWriter }

func (m OtherStruct) Encode(_ interface{}, _ context.Context) func(map[string]interface{}) []byte {
	w := newWriter()
	return func(opts map[string]interface{}) []byte {
		w.WriteInt(m.x)
		return w.Bytes()
	}
}
